zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Singleton於大約1251年出生在英國藍卡爾辛格登時，她的父親Alan de Singleton27歲，母親Katherine Conyers19歲。她於1284年與Sir Thomas Banastre II在英國藍卡爾奧頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1303年之後在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Singleton于大约1251年出生在英国藍卡爾辛格登时，她的父亲Alan de Singleton27岁，母亲Katherine Conyers19岁。她于1284年与Sir Thomas Banastre II在英国藍卡爾奧頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1303年之后在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Singleton was born about 1251, in Singleton, Lancashire, England, her father, Alan de Singleton, was 27 and her mother, Katherine Conyers, was 19. She married Sir Thomas Banastre II in 1284, in Aughton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died after 1303, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Singleton est née environ 1251, à Singleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Singleton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Katherine Conyers, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Banastre II en 1284, à Aughton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée après 1303, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Singleton um 1251 in Singleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan de Singleton 27 und ihre Mutter Katherine Conyers 19. Sie hat 1284 in Aughton, Lancashire, England Sir Thomas Banastre II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1303 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Singleton è nata il circa 1251 nel Singleton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Alan de Singleton, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Katherine Conyers, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Banastre II nel 1284, nel Aughton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1303, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Singletonが約1251年にイギリスランカシュアイアシングレトンで生まれた時，父Alan de Singletonは27歳，母Katherine Conyersは19歳であった。1284年にイギリスランカシュアイアアウトンでSir Thomas Banastre IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1303年以後にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Singleton(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 랭카실르 징글레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan de Singleton(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Conyers(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 랭카실르 오턴에서 Sir Thomas Banastre II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플레스턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Singleton nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Singleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Singleton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Conyers, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Banastre II em 1284, em Aughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1303, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Singleton родилась около 1251 г. в местности синглетон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alan de Singleton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Conyers, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Banastre II в 1284 г. в местности аугтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла после 1303 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
